summary: Observed only activation/config/session-maintenance activity. FireFlow repeatedly reported zero tickets in DB, and no concrete request, approval, implementation, or review branch with an identifier was present in retained logs.
follow_up_recommendations: Create or replay one real FireFlow request/ticket on the lab and rerun correlation immediately while logs are fresh.
If a later delegation tier allows it, query the rt3 database directly to confirm ticket counts and recent ticket/request rows.
